children.text: acquire and maintain real or personal property;
notwithstanding chapter 63 of title 31, enter into a contract, cooperative agreement, memorandum of understanding, or other agreement.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Except as provided in paragraph (2), the Secretary may pay a tort claim, in the manner authorized by the first paragraph of , if the claim arises outside the United States in connection with an activity authorized under this chapter.section 2672 of title 28

children.heading: Requirements
children.label: 2 Requirements
children.text: A claim may not be allowed under this subsection unless the claim is presented in writing to the Secretary not later than 2 years after the date on which the claim arises.
